summary: A Fox News broadcast panel segment (LIVE, FOX NEWS ALERT banner, three-box anchor/guest layout, lower-thirds 'NOEM TOUTS DEPORTATION AGENDA IN CENTRAL AMERICA' and 'NOEM TOURS NOTORIOUS EL SALVADORAN MEGA PRISON') discussing Secretary Noem's CECOT visit, then cutting to Noem's @Sec_Noem clip standing before a packed cell of detainees delivering her warning to illegal migrants. It contrasts Noem's trip with Biden/Harris/Mayorkas. This is a TV news/commentary clip embedding the agency video, not original stylized or music-driven youth-appeal content, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT / LIVE; 'NOEM TOUTS DEPORTATION AGENDA IN CENTRAL AMERICA'; 'NOEM TOURS NOTORIOUS EL SALVADORAN MEGA PRISON'; 'DHS SEC NOEM ISSUES WARNING TO ILLEGAL MIGRANTS'; '@SEC_NOEM/X WEDNESDAY'; KRISTI NOEM | DHS SECRETARY
